sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ فَاطِمَةُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ دَوَاءٍ لِلسُّعَالِ.
sentences.translation: Fatima je otišla u apoteku da kupi lijek za kašalj.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima went to the pharmacy to buy cough medicine.

sentences.translation: Farmaceut je upitao o njezinim simptomima.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist asked about her symptoms.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّهَا تَسْعُلُ كَثِيرًا وَتَشْعُرُ بِبَرْدٍ.
sentences.translation: Rekla je da mnogo kašlje i da se osjeća prehlaðeno.
sentences.translationEn: She said she coughs a lot and feels cold.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهَا الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ دَوَاءً مُنَاسِبًا وَشَرَحَ لَهَا كَيْفَ تَأْخُذُهُ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut joj je dao odgovarajući lijek i objasnio kako ga uzeti.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave her a suitable medicine and explained how to take it.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَتْ فَاطِمَةُ الصَّيْدَلَانِيَّ وَعَادَتْ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Fatima je zahvalila farmaceutu i vratila se kući.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima thanked the pharmacist and went back home.
